internal_control_name: Remote Access: Prohibited Protocols and Commands

mappings.reason: Securely Manage Enterprise Assets and Software explicitly prohibits insecure management protocols (Telnet, HTTP) for administrative remote sessions, directly satisfying the prohibited protocol listing requirement for management access.

Securely Manage Network Infrastructure mandates secure network protocols (SSH, HTTPS) for network device management, implicitly defining prohibited insecure protocols for network infrastructure remote sessions.
Ensure Remote Devices Utilize a VPN requires VPN protocols for remote access, defining the allowed protocol and implicitly prohibiting direct non-VPN remote session protocols for end-user devices.
